# Noble

- **Ability Scores::** Strength, Intelligence, Charisma
- **Feat::** [[skilled]]
- **Skill Proficiencies::** [[history]], [[persuasion]]
- **Tool Proficiency::** Choose one kind of [[gaming_set Set]]
- **Equipment::** Choose A or B: (A) [[gaming_set Set]] (same as above), [[fine_clothes Clothes]], [[perfume]], 29 GP; or (B) 50 GP
